message:
fix(patterns): emit detections for all anchor-only rule occurrences

Previously the pattern engine stored only the first anchor match per
rule, silently dropping subsequent occurrences of the same anchor text
within a single scan. This caused under-counting for anchor-only rules
when the anchor string appeared multiple times.

Change matched_anchors_by_rule from a single-entry map to a Vec of
(anchor_text, span) pairs per rule index. For anchor-only rules,
iterate all collected occurrences and emit a separate Detection with
correct span and per-occurrence trace evidence for each.

Add test detect_multiple_anchor_matches verifying 3 occurrences of
"foo" in "foo bar foo baz foo" produce 3 distinct detections with
non-overlapping spans.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
